name: Spinach Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach well and put it in a non-aluminum pot. Cover and cook it in its own water over medium heat until wilted, about 5 minutes.
2. Put the wilted spinach in a strainer and, with the back of a large spoon, squeeze as much liquid from the spinach as possible. If it is cool enough to handle, squeeze the water out with your hands, a small handful at a time.
3. Chop the spinach by hand or in a food processor, season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg, and mix with 4 tablespoons of butter.
4. Use the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to grease the gratin dish. Add the spinach, cover with Mornay Sauce (See RECIPE), and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Twenty minutes before serving, place in a preheated oven at 375°F. Bake until browned and bubbly.
